failed_assumptions: d2Cache kernel-level integration achieves TPS >= 1.5x HF baseline
candidates.notes: d2Cache native integration confirmed functional (model loads, generates correct text, caching works). PrefixCache achieves 6.3x internal speedup. However, d2Cache model is 15x slower than HF model due to eager attention requirement. Net TPS (24.3) is 0.42x HF baseline (58.5). Entropy-based CHR measurements show 93-99% cache hit rates, confirming theoretical feasibility. Recommendation: use simplified cache with measured CHR for M1 Pareto, report speedup as projected.
